notes: ## [1.9.0] - 2026-05-23  ### Added - **💾 Presets Disk Persistence**: Profile presets are now securely saved to disk, surviving app reinstalls and updates. - **🛡️ Secure Backend Commands**: Implemented `load_presets` and `save_presets` commands in the Tauri Rust backend to securely manage presets file storage.  ### Changed - **🚀 Performance (React)**: Restructured loading state so that each tab manages its own fetching process locally, preventing the entire app from locking up during a request. - **⚡ Performance (Rust)**: System process detection logic was rewritten using a singleton `OnceLock`, drastically reducing CPU overhead. - **🧹 CSS Codebase**: Refactored CSS by removing all duplicate declarations across stylesheets and purged unused dead styles.  ### Fixed - **🧩 Hook Optimization**: Stabilized dependencies in `useLcu` and `useMusicSync` using proper `useCallback` implementations.
